allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "=== Apache estado ==="; Get-Process httpd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id | Format-Table; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { "ERROR: $_" }; "---"; $env:PGPASSWORD = "admin123"; $psql = "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe"; "=== Member id=1 ==="; & $psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -d iron_body -c "SELECT id, member_uuid, full_name, document_number, email, phone FROM members LIMIT 5;" 2>&1; "=== Transacción IRON-20260527-ZV0WI3-19454 ==="; & $psql -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -d iron_body -c "SELECT reference, status, amount, currency, customer, failure_reason FROM payment_transactions WHERE reference LIKE 'IRON-20260527%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('C:\\Users\\Oscar\\Downloads\\NetGymValidator\\NetGymValidator.exe'\); $sb = [System.Text.StringBuilder]::new\(\); $current = [System.Text.StringBuilder]::new\(\); foreach \($b in $bytes\) { if \($b -ge 32 -and $b -le 126\) { [void]$current.Append\([char]$b\) } else { if \($current.Length -ge 5\) { [void]$sb.AppendLine\($current.ToString\(\)\) }; $current.Clear\(\) | Out-Null } }; $sb.ToString\(\) | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 -Path 'C:\\Users\\Oscar\\Downloads\\NetGymValidator.strings.txt'; \(Get-Item 'C:\\Users\\Oscar\\Downloads\\NetGymValidator.strings.txt'\).Length)

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -match 'NetGym|huella|MasterGym|Validator' -or $_.ProcessName -match 'NetGym|Validator' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($sp = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort; $sp.PortName = 'COM5'; $sp.BaudRate = 9600; $sp.Parity = 'None'; $sp.DataBits = 8; $sp.StopBits = 'One'; try { $sp.Open\(\); Write-Host "OPEN OK"; $sp.WriteLine\("PULSE 3000"\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Write-Host "WRITE OK"; $sp.Close\(\); Write-Host "CLOSE OK" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } finally { if \($sp.IsOpen\) { $sp.Close\(\) } })

PowerShell($sp = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort 'COM5', 9600, None, 8, One; try { $sp.Open\(\); Write-Host "OPEN OK" -ForegroundColor Green; $sp.WriteLine\("PULSE 3000"\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Write-Host "WRITE OK \(3 bytes + CR/LF enviados a COM5\)" -ForegroundColor Green; $sp.Close\(\); Write-Host "CLOSE OK" -ForegroundColor Green } catch { Write-Host "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" -ForegroundColor Red } finally { if \($sp.IsOpen\) { $sp.Close\(\) }; $sp.Dispose\(\) })
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process powershell, pwsh, php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Id 28500 | Format-List ProcessName, Id, StartTime, MainWindowTitle, Path")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-PnpDevice -PresentOnly -Class Ports | Select FriendlyName, Status | Format-Table -AutoSize; '---'; [System.IO.Ports.SerialPort]::GetPortNames\(\)")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "[System.IO.Ports.SerialPort]::GetPortNames\(\); Get-PnpDevice -PresentOnly -Class Ports -InstanceId 'USB\\VID_1A86&PID_7523*' | Select FriendlyName, Status | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process httpd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table ProcessName, Id, StartTime -AutoSize")
